title: Laveen Kanal
text: Home * People * Laveen Kanal Laveen Kanal [1] Laveen N. Kanal , (born September 29, 1931) an American electrical engineer, high technology entrepreneur, educator, and professor emeritus of computer science at University of Maryland, College Park [2] . His research interests include various AI topics, search algorithms , pattern recognition , and the application of computational intelligence technologies to image understanding and intelligent tutoring systems [3] .
